title: Head of Marketing and Growth
description: Odin is building investment infrastructure for private markets — a full-stack platform for launching and running private investment firms (think 'Shopify for VC and PE'). They handle legals, investor onboarding, KYC/AML, payments, tax, reporting, and exits. Already trusted by over 10,000 angels, VCs, and founders and administering over $500M in assets across pre-seed to Series E. The Head of Marketing and Growth will own and scale the company's growth strategy across acquisition, activation, and revenue in a fast-growing B2B fintech environment.
score_reason: Strong fit on fintech, B2B SaaS, and GTM expertise with remote location match. However, this is primarily a marketing/growth leadership role rather than pure RevOps, which is Omri's core strength—likely requires more brand-building and demand gen focus than his RevOps background emphasizes.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM motions, and Odin's infrastructure play for private markets caught my attention. The complexity of your customer journey (KYC/AML, investor onboarding, multi-stakeholder activation) is exactly where RevOps and growth operations intersect. I'd be curious if you're looking to layer operational rigor and pipeline efficiency into your growth strategy as you scale beyond 10,000 users.

I'd love to explore how hands-on delivery rigor paired with go-to-market strategy could accelerate enterprise expansion for your platform.

title: Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Elite Technology is the trusted automation platform for law-firm operations, delivering a cloud-native SaaS platform unifying financial, invoice, time, and data management. The Manager, Revenue Operations leads billing/invoicing and collections functions with shared ownership of processes and systems connecting Salesforce (CRM/CPQ) and NetSuite. The role is accountable for accurate, timely invoicing, strong cash collections, and end-to-end order-to-cash process optimization. Remote within the U.S., with hybrid options in NYC, LA, Costa Rica, and the Philippines.
